title: Nailed It!
description: A Simple Nail and Hammer Mod To Add To Builds And Gameplay.
body: This Mod Adds A Simple Nail Mechanic. There Are Now Nails, Nails With Ropes, A New Workbench Crafting Device, Hammers, A New Villager, And More! You Can Place Nails On Blocks And Right Click The Nail With A Hammer Of Any Kind To Hit The Nail Into The Block. The Same Goes For Rope Nails, You Can Craft Rope Nails With A String And A Nail, Or You Can Turn Nails Into Rope Nails By Right Clicking A Normal Nail With String. Nailing Rope Nails Into Windows Will Board Up The Windows. The New Carpenter Villager Sells Extremely Useful And Valuable Items, A Villager Will Turn Into A Carpenter With A Workbench. If You Have A Nail In Your Off Hand And A Hammer In Your Main Hand, You Can Hit Nails Like Projectiles And Do A Lot Of Damage.
